name: Zucchini Mexican Style
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Onion, thinly sliced and separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the grated zucchini, sliced onion, celery, grated carrot, and green pepper with hot oil for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
2. Stir in the taco sauce, mustard, basil, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the tomatoes and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
